calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Chad Brooks To Perpetuate Testimony Of William Brooks By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Dec-26-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew Chew of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner Chad Brooks.

RULING: PETITIONER'S PETITION TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF WILLIAM BROOKS BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION
Hearing held, not argued and tentative ruling adopted: Petitioner's Petition to Perpetuate Testimony of William Brooks by Videotaped Deposition is DENIED for failure to submit proof of service as to all entities named in the petition as adverse parties in an anticipated wrongful death action. (Petition 10.) Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
